mainHtml:
Home page/Industries/automobile manufacturing

Automotive R&D and small-batch parts manufacturing

Covering test samples, tooling fixtures, interior and exterior structural parts and functional verification parts, helping the R&D team obtain manufacturability feedback faster during the design verification phase.

Functional prototypeFixture fixtureLightweightlow-volume trial production

From R&D samples to trial production verification

Automotive projects change rapidly, so the page focuses on engineering collaboration and manufacturing verification to avoid making out-of-scope promises on vehicle regulations and road test results.

Structural and assembly verification

A combination of CNC, sheet metal and 3D printing supports brackets, housings, connectors and assembly verification parts.

Test and production fixtures

Provide customized tooling for laboratory testing, positioning assembly, inspection calibration and production line trial production.

low-volume trial production

Verify the structure, material, surface and assembly rhythm through low-volume processing before batch mold opening.

Manufacturing Priorities

01
Lightweight and strength balanceManufacturability assessment is performed based on materials, wall thickness, rib locations, and assembly stress.
02
Appearance and feel requirementsAppearance parts need to confirm the color difference, texture, edge and Surface Finishing acceptance standards in advance.
03
Batch consistencylow-volumees of parts require stable processing parameters and necessary first-piece confirmation records.

Review Checklist

No commitment to vehicle regulatory certificationClearly express the purpose of the sampleMaterial performance needs to be confirmed by actual measurementThe delivery date is subject to the quotation

Submit auto parts requirements and undergo manufacturing review first

Quickly exchange models, drawings and quantities for manufacturability recommendations and quotation paths.

Start assessment
